analyst_note: Q1 2024 marked by Operation Cronos (LockBit) on Feb 20. ALPHV/BlackCat in terminal decline following Dec 2023 FBI seizure. RansomHub had not yet emerged as dominant successor. H1 2024 payment volume was $459.8M total — quarterly split is estimated from H1 figures.

a1._label: Russian Domestic Actions Against Ecosystem Actors
a1.notes: No documented Russian domestic actions against RU/CIS ecosystem actors in Q1 2024. LockBit operator Dmitry Khoroshev (LockBitSupp) was not yet identified publicly — that came in May 2024.

a2._label: Time Lag: Referral to Observable Russian Action
a2.notes: L2 micro-layer log not operational for this period.

a3.notes: Populate from analyst model. LockBit takedown tests whether RU state protected LockBitSupp — no evidence of protection through Q1.

events.name: Operation Cronos — LockBit Infrastructure Takedown
events.notes: NCA-led operation. 2 arrests (Poland, Ukraine). 34 servers seized across 3 countries. 200+ crypto accounts frozen. 14,000 rogue accounts closed. 1,000+ decryption keys recovered. LockBit relaunched within ~1 week — full reconstitution. High ecosystem impact; no cooperation with RU state observed. Score: 10 (major infrastructure, arrests, financial disruption — penalized slightly for fast relaunch).

b1.notes: Operation Cronos is the dominant Q1 2024 LE event. LockBit relaunched quickly, limiting long-term operational effect, but the disruption caused significant affiliate defection and intelligence value.

b2.notes: ALPHV/BlackCat in decline following Dec 2023 FBI seizure. Forum disruption elevated around LockBit Cronos. RansomHub began emerging (Feb 2024). Recruitment shifts observed — affiliates moving away from LockBit brand. ANALYST INFERENCE — L2 event log sparse for this period.

c1._label: Ransom Payment Volume vs. Victim Count
c1.source: Chainalysis 2025 Crypto Crime Report (H1 2024 = $459.8M est. split); ransomware.live Q1 2024 victim count = 1,075
c1.notes: CREDIBILITY NOTE: Payment volume is ANALYST ESTIMATE derived from H1 2024 total of $459.8M (Chainalysis confirmed). Quarterly split is approximate — do not cite specific figure in strategic claims. Victim count (1,075) is confirmed from ransomware.live data.

c2.source: Coveware Quarterly Reports — sector breakdown not available at this granularity for Q1 2024
c2.notes: Populate from Coveware Q1 2024 quarterly report. Overall payment rate for 2024 trended from ~35% toward 25% by Q4. Sector splits require Coveware direct access.

c3.source: ransomware.live; Operation Cronos NCA/DOJ press releases Feb 2024
c3.notes: LockBit leak site seized Feb 20, relaunched within ~7 days (within 30 days = fast reconstitution). ALPHV leak site had been seized Dec 2023 — in Q1 2024 ALPHV was degraded but not yet fully dark. Avg days-to-publish not captured for this period.
